offer: For restaurant supply managers processing 10–20 orders/month, manual inventory tracking causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate inventory management instead of manual inventory management systems.
problem: manual inventory tracking leads to late orders and supplier penalties
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant supply managers

Community forums for sharing tools among managers

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
